name: date-of-birth-field
title: Date of Birth Field
description: Typed DOB entry with a live age readout and a configurable minimum-age gate.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: DOB as an ISO YYYY-MM-DD string (controlled/uncontrolled).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the ISO date, or undefined while incomplete/invalid.

props.name: minAge
props.description: Minimum age in years; below it the field flags (does not block).

props.name: order
props.description: Segment order passed to the underlying DateField.

clinicalNotes: Validates real dates (no 31 Feb via DateField, no future DOB here) and computes age at a caller-supplied "as of" date, not just today — important for age-at-encounter and eligibility. The minimum-age gate flags rather than silently blocking, so the reason is visible to the user and staff; the caller still decides whether to hard-stop. A typed day/month/year entry beats a calendar for a birth year decades back.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes date-field + field. Mirrors the platform's 18+ NDPR age gate.
